inclusion_criteria: Observational human studies (prospective/retrospective cohort, case–control, or cross-sectional) with an analytic comparison of PFOS exposure levels
Pregnant women and their newborns (mother–infant pairs)

Prenatal PFOS (perfluorooctanesulfonic acid) exposure quantified in biospecimens (e.g., maternal serum/plasma during pregnancy or cord blood), with comparisons across exposure levels (e.g., higher vs lower or per-unit increase)
Birth weight at delivery reported in grams or sufficient data to derive an effect estimate for birth weight (e.g., mean/SD, regression coefficients)
exclusion_criteria: Non-human studies or studies not involving pregnant women and their newborns
Exposure not specific to PFOS, not quantitatively measured, or only PFAS mixture results without PFOS-specific estimates
No outcome data on birth weight in grams or only categorical outcomes (e.g., low birth weight yes/no) without continuous birth weight
Non-original research (systematic reviews, narrative reviews, editorials, commentaries) or designs without a comparator/association estimate
screening_criteria.description: Screening to include human observational studies assessing the association between quantified prenatal PFOS exposure and birth weight (in grams), comparing higher versus lower exposure levels in pregnant women and their newborns.
